content.text:
I’ll forward this payload if there’s an existing local Polly handoff path in this workspace. First I’m checking the required context files and any relay script/integration so I can route it correctly.I found the workspace context files; next I’m reading the required startup docs and then I’ll locate how “Polly” forwarding is expected to happen in this repo.I’ve loaded the required context; there’s no `MEMORY.md` or `memory/` notes yet. I’m now scanning the workspace for any existing “Polly” forwarding mechanism so I can execute the handoff exactly once.I couldn’t find any in-repo relay code, so I’m checking whether there’s a workspace CLI integration for routing messages to Polly outside this folder.I found an `openclaw` CLI, but it fails in this read-only sandbox before showing commands. I’m inspecting the installed package text to see if there’s a direct local endpoint/command for sending a message to Polly.I found the CLI docs include `openclaw message send`, so I’m now trying a safe CLI invocation path that avoids the temp-dir guard which blocked the default entrypoint.The local gateway isn’t reachable from this session and the filesystem is fully read-only, so automated relay commands are blocked. I’m checking whether any MCP server in this environment exposes a direct “send to Polly” action as a fallback.I can’t access process controls or a live gateway from this sandbox, so direct delivery is blocked here. I’ll do one last check for an alternate lightweight sender binary (`acp`) that might still work without temp writes.I couldn’t forward it automatically from this session: the sandbox is read-only and `openclaw` can’t run here (it fails before send), and the local gateway isn’t reachable.

Use this exact relay to Polly:

`[Wed 2026-04-08 16:19 EDT] Intake payload: {"generated_at":"2026-04-08T20:18:28Z","mailbox":"lhyman@gmail.com","new_threads_count":0,"items":[],"notes":["No new thread_ids since last sweep."]}`

If you want to send via CLI on your normal shell, run:

`openclaw agent --agent Polly --message '[Wed 2026-04-08 16:19 EDT] Intake payload: {"generated_at":"2026-04-08T20:18:28Z","mailbox":"lhyman@gmail.com","new_threads_count":0,"items":[],"notes":["No new thread_ids since last sweep."]}'`
